productDisplayName: Reebok Unisex Trail Mudslinger Black Shoe
description: FOR THE TOUGH TO GET GOINGWhen the going gets tough, the tough hit the tracks with vengeance. To maximize this built up energy in you grab for yourself a pair of the reebok Trail Mudslinger. Constructed for comfort, durability, traction and protection from elements, the reebok Trail Mudslinger is the best running shoe you can ever find.Constructed with a meshed upper, the Trail Mudslinger offers ample ventilation for the feet, while the synthetic overlays provide great structure to the foot, locking down the foot in place. Replete with a cushioned sockliner and padded tongue, this lightweight running shoe from Reebok offers a complete snug Fit, locking down the foot in place. The lace-up system enhances this comfort fit.For those who love their runsThe footbed of the Reebok Trail Mudslinger is cushioned in the right places with shock-absorbing foam to provide that absolute comfort from impact and enhances your running energy. The DMX Shear in the heel ensures that your heel is locked in place, safe from shock and is all tough and ready to hit the trails.The durable rubber outsole is specially structured for great outdoors. Made of non-marking rubber, the outsole of the Reebok Trail Mudslinger is made of flexi grooves that allows the shoe to bend to the naturally movement of your feet, keeping it clean all the time. Coated with a mudguard bumper, the Reebok Trail Mudslinger helps protect the shoe from abrasion, while the reinforced toe bumper adds on to the protective shield, making this a running shoe to die for. Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays provide breath ability Lace-ups provide a snug fit Cushioned collar, tongue and footbed for extra comfort Mesh tongue for greater breath ability Removable sockliner accommodates orthotics Midsole IMEVA midsole delivers cushioned underfoot comfort Outsole DMX Ride enhanced cushioning system designed for lasting comfort Coated mudguard bumper gives added protection against abrasion Reinforced toe bumper for added protection Tread pattern provides a smooth grip while traversing trails Forefoot flex grooves for increased flexibility through pushoff High-abrasion, multi-surface rubber outsole for durability and traction Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
